name: Vini
greetingText: I'm so glad to have met you in the most beautiful time of our lives
wishText: May your beauty never fade, with flowers in your hair year after year. Wishing you happiness always.
textInChatBox: Wishing you a very happy birthday!!! Wishing you lots and lots of happiness...
text2: I wanted to give you a surprise
text3: I spent a lot of time thinking about it
text4: I realized, I wanted to do something
outroText: I hope you like this little surprise!
replayText: If you like it, you can watch it again! Or...
letterContent:
Well, where to start, the countless ragebait tries or the late night yaps, nevertheless none of those are as interesting as the tea's we have shared.

uhh, I diverged a bit again SO what I wanted to say is THANKKK YOUU SO MUCH FOR STAYING ALIVEEE

you mean a lot and lot and beyond to everyone you talk, dont let someone tell you otherwise
letterSignoff:
A VERY HAPPYY BIRTHDAY VINISHAA!!!
May god bless (me)
